name: productpulse
description: ProductPulse — a Product Hunt-style launch feed (MERN, 2021-2022 stack). Engineering lesson: trending ranking algorithm + optimistic UI + comment threads.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c magenta,cyan "npm run server" "npm run client"
scripts.install-all: npm install && npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
